ann.title: Quarterly Results - Q1 FY2025
ann.detail: Adani Green Energy reported a net profit of INR 200 crores for Q1 FY2025, with a capacity addition of 300 MW during the quarter.

ann.title: Project Award - Solar Project in Rajasthan
ann.detail: Awarded a contract for a 500 MW solar project in Rajasthan, to be commissioned by Q4 FY2026.

ann.title: Commissioning of Wind Project
ann.detail: Successfully commissioned a 150 MW wind power project in Gujarat, contributing significantly to renewable capacity.

ann.title: Board Meeting Outcomes - Capex Plans
ann.detail: The board approved a capex plan of INR 1500 crores for renewable energy projects in the upcoming financial year.

ann.title: Contract Signing for Wind Energy Projects
ann.detail: Signed contracts for two wind energy projects totaling 200 MW capacity with a completion deadline in 2027.

ann.title: Investor Presentation - Annual Results
ann.detail: Presented annual results with highlights, including a revenue growth of 25% and a total operational capacity of 4000 MW.

ann.title: Completion of 250 MW Solar Park
ann.detail: Completed the 250 MW solar park in Tamil Nadu ahead of schedule, enhancing the company's solar capacity.

ann.title: Funding Secured for New Projects
ann.detail: Secured funding of INR 1000 crores from international investors for upcoming renewable projects.
